title: CSS Filters and Visual Effects Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on applying graphical effects using CSS filter functions.

questions.question: Which CSS filter function is used to create a Gaussian blur effect?
What is the primary difference between box-shadow and the drop-shadow() filter function?
options: drop-shadow() follows the actual alpha channel of the element's content.
There is no difference between them.

questions.question: Which filter function would make an image completely black and white?
How do you apply multiple filters to a single element?
options: Separate each function with a comma in one filter property.
Separate each function with a space in one filter property.
It's not possible to apply more than one filter.

questions.question: What is the primary use of the backdrop-filter property?
options: To filter the content inside the element itself.
To filter the area behind an element, like for glassmorphism effects.
To move the element to the back of the stack.
To filter the text content only.
